attributes.action: Disqualify any prospective MP from standing if they hold a PPE degree.
attributes.additional_details: Stop under-qualified, over-entitled politicians from lording it over us when they have zero practical experience of running anything of any meaningful complexity. The PPE degree should not be a shortcut to power, nor a substitute for ability.
attributes.background: Holding a PPE degree is an insufficient qualification for someone who wishes to run the country. It is seen by too many as a route to government, but it is a generic, meaningless subject that requires zero real-world ability, particularly for those in the Cabinet. Make Government competent again.

rejection.details:
There aren't currently any degree or other types of qualification requirements for standing to become an MP. We could accept a petition calling for qualification requirements to be introduced, providing it was clear what you'd like these to be. 

As an example, we've previously opened this petition: 
Introduce Qualification exams to become an MP: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/730698
